hero.title: Conditional Incentive
hero.subtitle: Accelerating Regenerative Agriculture
hero.description: Conditional incentive for the transition from conventional agriculture to regenerative practices among the most vulnerable producers in Yoro, Honduras.

pilot.title: Key data from Yoro
pilot.quote: Accelerating the transition from conventional agriculture to regenerative and resilient agriculture

goals.title: Goal compliance
items: 80% of producers with advanced level in Regenerative Agriculture (FAT)
80% of producers with collection from the start of the year
80% of producers with nutritional management (soil analysis)

ecolluvia.title: Ecolluvía System
ecolluvia.description: Project to improve producers' quality of life through the installation of rainwater harvesting and use systems for various agricultural and domestic applications.
nextSteps: Expansion to more producers in the area

apiculture.title: Sustainable Apiculture
apiculture.description: Protection of Apis mellifera bees threatened by agrochemicals, diversifying income and improving coffee pollination.
